# Documentation Quality Report

## Overall Grade: A (9.0/10)

Documentation suite refreshed for v2.0.0. All counts updated (50 source files, 1401 tests, 30 agents, 32 test files, 210 exports). Two new lib modules documented (clean, config-audit). Framework count fixed (23). Claw export count contradiction resolved. LOC counts corrected. Audit system documented in glossary and changelog.

| L4 | [src/lib/session-aliases.ts](../src/lib/session-aliases.ts) | **Missing `@throws` annotations.** `setPreferredPackageManager()`, `setProjectPackageManager()` throw but lack `@throws` in JSDoc. |

## Example Verification

No `@example` tags or standalone code examples were found in JSDoc comments across `src/lib/`. The `docs/` markdown files contain no runnable code examples referencing library functions.

The README contains usage examples for CLI commands (`ecc install`, `ecc init`) which are shell commands, not library API examples. These are syntactically correct.

## Mermaid Diagram Validation

All 10 diagrams in `docs/diagrams/` were validated for syntax correctness and line-break format.

All diagrams use `<br/>` for multi-line labels within Mermaid nodes. No instances of literal `\n` were found in any diagram file. This is the correct format for Mermaid rendering.
